name: What kind of content makes AEO pages more likely to get cited?
description: Use original data, case studies, expert quotes, and clearly supported claims. Pages that add information gain and prove their points are more likely to be cited

mainEntity.name: What kind of content makes AEO pages more likely to get cited?

acceptedAnswer.text: The best evidence is original, specific, and easy to verify. That includes first-party data, customer examples, expert quotes, case studies, product screenshots, and citations from trusted sources, because answer engines are more likely to trust pages that show authority and information gain.
acceptedAnswer.description: Use original data, case studies, expert quotes, and clearly supported claims. Pages that add information gain and prove their points are more likely to be cited by answer engines.
